This '''corporal''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] stationed at [[Haven Base]] on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]]. His tasks included maintaining the camouflagued [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]] used to patrol the planet's surface.

==Appearances==
